issues.description: Blocker mechanic is a static ability, not a triggered effect. Should not use OnAttacked trigger. Blocker allows the player to respond to opponent's attack declaration—this is a special game mechanic, typically represented as a keyword or special action, not a standard trigger-action pair.
Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn' not 'OnPlay'. Effect occurs at end of your turn, not when card is played.

Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but the effect allows trashing as a cost/condition for the main action. Structure should be: if player trashes 1 card from hand, then set this character as active (Rest it). The Rest action should occur conditionally after the trash.
Second effect is missing a condition that trashing is optional ('You may trash'). Should include optional flag or conditional logic.
